indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is a significant obstacle to setting up a computer workstation, as it takes up a large portion of the space and obstructs access to the window.

indicators.name: window
indicators.rationale: The window is partially obstructed by curtains, reducing the amount of natural light available for work and potentially creating a less comfortable working environment.

indicators.name: table
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface suitable for placing a computer or other work-related items.

indicators.name: lighting
indicators.rationale: The ambient lighting from the chandelier and lamps provides sufficient illumination for work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While the lighting is suitable, the presence of a bed and partially obstructed window create significant obstacles to setting up a workspace. There is no flat surface available for placing a computer or other work-related items, which further undermines the suitability of the space for this activity.
